subject: Research Generic Agent Skills specification
description:
Use Context7 MCP tools and web search to fetch and analyze the Generic Agent Skills (agentskills.io) specification documentation.

Gather:
- Complete skill file format and structure (frontmatter fields, section layout)
- Required vs optional fields
- Naming conventions and idioms specific to GAS
- Example skill files demonstrating best practices
- Spec version information
- How GAS skills differ from OpenCode and Codex formats
- Any portability or cross-platform considerations

Since the create-skill skill itself is built to the GAS format, this research also validates the host format.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] GAS skill format fully documented (frontmatter, sections, structure)
- [ ] Required fields identified and listed
- [ ] Optional fields identified with descriptions
- [ ] At least 2 example skills analyzed for patterns
- [ ] Spec version captured
- [ ] Differences from OpenCode format noted

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Handle case where Context7 docs are incomplete — supplement with web search
- [ ] Handle case where GAS spec is evolving — capture latest stable version

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] If Context7 is unavailable, fall back to web search
- [ ] Document any gaps or uncertainties in findings

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify all required fields are captured by cross-referencing agentskills.io
• Manual: Confirm example skills match documented format

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.2

metadata.spec_phase_name: Platform Expansion - Generic Agent Skills & Codex
